No other appearances made in this matter.

RULING - Defendant did not notify the Court or opposing side of his intent to appear today to contest the Court's tentative ruling. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. ASSIGNEE SEQUOIA CONCEPTS, INC.'S Motion For Order Vacating Stay Of Enforcement Of Judgment Due To Default Of Defendant, Stuart David Briggs is granted. No opposition filed.
